Class RateLimitConfig

java.lang.Object
server.ratelimiter.RateLimitConfig
public class RateLimitConfig extends Object
Configuration class that maps URIs to their respective rate limiting rules. Follows SRP by handling configuration lookup separate from execution logic.

  • Nested Class Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • RateLimitConfig

      public RateLimitConfig(long defaultCapacity, double defaultRefillRate)
      Constructs the config with a default rate limit rule.
      Parameters:
      defaultCapacity - the default token capacity
      defaultRefillRate - the default refill rate per second

  • Method Details

    • addRule

      public void addRule(String uri, long capacity, double refillRate)
      Adds or overrides a rate limiting rule for a specific URI.
      Parameters:
      uri - the URI pattern to match
      capacity - the token capacity for this URI
      refillRate - the refill rate per second for this URI

    • getRule

      public RateLimitConfig.LimitRule getRule(String uri)
      Retrieves the rate limiting rule for a given URI, falling back to the default rule.
      Parameters:
      uri - the requested URI
      Returns:
      the applicable LimitRule
